chunks.title: The Golden Image and Decree
chunks.reason: Describes the construction of the image and the king's decree for universal worship.

chunks.title: The Accusation Against the Jews
chunks.reason: Narrates the Chaldeans bringing charges against Shadrach, Meshach, and Abed-nego.

chunks.title: Confrontation and Response
chunks.reason: Records the dialogue between Nebuchadnezzar and the three men regarding their faith.

chunks.title: Thrown into the Furnace
chunks.reason: Details the king's rage and the casting of the men into the fiery furnace.

chunks.title: The Fourth Man in the Fire
chunks.reason: Describes Nebuchadnezzar's vision of a fourth figure and the men emerging unharmed.

chunks.title: The King's Decree and Praise
chunks.reason: Contains the king's blessing of God and his new decree regarding the Jews' God.
